faq.q1: How do I start earning with BodaGo?
faq.a1: To start earning, you need to register as a rider, upload your documents for verification, and once approved, you can go online to receive delivery requests.
faq.a2: You need a valid driver's license (Class A), National ID or Passport, Vehicle Registration Card, and valid Insurance.
faq.a3: Earnings are paid out weekly to your registered mobile money account (M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, or Airtel Money).
faq.a4: We support Boda Bodas, Bajajis, and Guta. All vehicles must be in good working condition and properly registered.
faq.q5: Can I choose my working hours?
faq.a5: Yes, BodaGo offers complete flexibility. You can go online and offline whenever you want.
faq.q6: What if I have an issue during a delivery?
faq.a6: You can contact our 24/7 support team through the app's Support section or call our emergency line.
faq.a7: Fares are calculated based on the distance between pickup and drop-off, package size, and current demand.
faq.a8: Yes, BodaGo charges a small service fee (18%) on each completed delivery to maintain the platform and provide support.
faq.q9: How do I handle cash payments?
faq.a9: For cash on delivery orders, you collect the full amount from the customer. The service fee will be deducted from your digital balance.
faq.a10: Currently, we operate across all districts of Dar es Salaam. We are expanding to other cities soon.
faq.q11: Can I deliver multiple packages at once?
faq.a11: The app currently assigns one delivery at a time to ensure speed and safety. Batching may be available for specific routes.
faq.q12: How do I maintain a high rating?
faq.a12: Be professional, handle packages with care, and ensure timely deliveries to receive positive ratings from customers.

about.about_content: BodaGo Rider is the official app for delivery partners on the BodaGo platform. Join thousands of riders earning money by delivering packages across Dar es Salaam, Tanzania. Work on your own schedule and earn competitive rates with every delivery.
about.step1_desc: Create your account and submit required documents
about.step2_desc: Toggle your availability to start receiving requests
about.step3_desc: Accept delivery requests and earn money
about.step4_desc: Receive weekly payouts to your mobile money account
about.boda_desc: Best for small packages and quick deliveries
